mapper.select: select id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_num, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time from shopping_cart where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0

select sc.id as shoppingCartId, c.id as commodityId, c.commodity_name as commodityName, sc.commodity_num as commodityNum, c.commodity_discounted_price as commodityDiscountPrice, c.commodity_price as commodityPrice, cc.category_name as commodityCategoryName, cc.id as commodityCategoryId, IF(c.oversold_configurations = c.oversold, 'true', 'false') as isNoStock, IF(sc.commodity_num > c.oversold_configurations+c.inventory-c.oversold, 'true', 'false') as isBuyNumMoreThanStockNum from shopping_cart sc inner join commodity c on sc.commodity_id = c.id inner join commodity_category cc on c.category_id = cc.id where sc.user_id = #{userId} and c.available_status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into shopping_cart(id, user_id, commodity_id, commodity_num, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{id}, #{userId}, #{commodityId}, #{commodityNum}, #{isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{updateUser}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})

insert into shopping_cart(id,user_id, commodity_id, commodity_num, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.commodityNum}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})

insert into shopping_cart(id,user_id, commodity_id, commodity_num, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values
(#{id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.commodityNum}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{entity.createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime})
on duplicate key update commodity_num = values(commodity_num), update_user = values(update_user), update_time = values(update_time)

insert into shopping_cart(id,user_id, commodity_id, commodity_num, is_deleted, create_user, update_user, create_time, update_time) values (#{entity.id},#{entity.userId}, #{entity.commodityId}, #{entity.commodityNum}, #{entity.isDeleted}, #{createUser}, #{entity.updateUser}, #{entity.createTime}, #{entity.updateTime}) on duplicate key update commodity_num = values(commodity_num), update_user = values(update_user), update_time = values(update_time)
